title: Pos Display Shop 5 x A4 Portrait Leaflet Holder Wall Mountable LDS5000 Recyclable!
features: SPACE SAVING WALL MOUNT HOLDERS: These A4 Portrait plastic holders have a flat back so can be attached to a wall, without impacting on your desktop space, while also increasing visibility of your documents

WIDE RANGE OF USES: These versatile wall mounted holders are great for leaflets, brochures, literature, documents, menus, drinks lists, price lists, offers, promotional details / information, bulletins, maps, forms, tourist / customer / employee information, data sheets, work sheets, activity sheets, competition forms, invoices, stationery, tablets, remote controls etc

SUITABLE FOR MANY PLACES: Our reusable holders can be easily fixed to a wall in cafes / coffee shops, restaurants, retail / shops, offices, schools, libraries, showrooms, reception areas, foyers, customer services, health centres / services, work places, at home, shows, exhibitions, information centres, leisure centres etc
SIMPLE MODERN DESIGN: This pack of leaflet holders are crystal clear, have screw holes in the back (fixings not supplied) and have a scoop front for easy access
APPROXIMATE SIZES: External: 250mm High x 230mm Wide x 40mm Deep. Internal: 225mm Wide x 35mm Deep
description: Product Description A4 Portrait Wall Leaflet Holders LDS5000 x 5 5 x Wall Mountable Menu Holders / Leaflet Holders / Brochure Dispensers Ideal for leaflets, drinks lists, menus, other lists, forms, brochures, documents, invoices, offers, promotional details / information, employee / customer / tourist information, health information, maps, work sheets, activity sheets, data sheets, literature etc Great for use in cafes / coffee shops, bars, restaurants, hotels, retail / shops, offices, schools, libraries, showrooms, receptions, foyers, hospitals, health centres / services, opticians, work places, factories, at shows, exhibitions, information centres, leisure centres etc Manufactured in clear plastic A4 Portrait Pack of 5 Scoop front for easy access Wall mountable (fixings not supplied) Easy to install, use and transport 35mm internal depth, can hold numerous sheets of paper Code: LDS5000 x 5 Approximate sizes: Overall: 250mm (25cm) High x 230mm (23cm) Wide x 40mm (4cm) Deep Internal: 225mm (22.5cm) Wide x 35mm (3.5cm) Deep Pos Display Shop is a trusted UK company that has been trading for more than 30 years. We reuse cardboard boxes and packaging where we can, to reduce waste. Care instructions: Wipe clean only, using non abrasive products. All acrylic and PVC products are made in our UK factory. Ideal for use in many settings Leisure Our reusable wall mountable holders are extremely versatile and are ideal for holding menus, drinks lists, forms, special offers, customer information, leaflets, brochures etc. Great for use in hotels, cafes, restaurants, bars, gyms etc, to have information readily available to your customers whilst also ensuring your menus etc, stay clean, accessible and in one piece. Retail / Showroom / Office Ideal for holding your offers, adverts, sales, forms, lists, customer information, information leaflets, brochures etc, in store, on sale stands, on the front of desks, counters, near window displays etc. 35mm internal depth for holding numerous leaflets / brochures / offers etc. They are fully reusable and not single use. Exhibition / Show / Fair Crystal clear design with holes in the back, so they can be screwed to a wall. (Fixings are not supplied) Perfect for taking to craft fairs, trade shows, wedding events etc, to hold your lists, information, leaflets, brochures, images / photos, posters, signs etc. Hospital / Healthcare These wall mountable holders are very versatile throughout healthcare settings. They can hold customer information, patient information, forms, labelling, directions, signs, lists, product information etc, in waiting rooms, hospitals, doctor's surgeries, dentists, opticians, pharmacies, vets etc. Library / School Suitable for holding customer information, student information, parent information, book information, book of the month details, offers, forms, competition entries etc. Can be used in receptions, hallways, foyers, store rooms, near counters, desks etc. Keeps your information clean and protected whilst ensuring it is at the right level to be visible and accessible. Home These holders are great for use in many areas of the home for holding utensils, art supplies, paper, letters, certificates, recipes, music sheets, homework etc. As they are wall mountable (using screws - not supplied), they do not use up any valuable worktop / desk space. They are easy to wipe clean, using non abrasive products.
